## Topic

What aspect of ERC-8183 are you discussing?

- [ ] Job lifecycle / state machine
- [ ] Role definitions (Client, Provider, Evaluator)
- [ ] Smart contract interface
- [ ] Hooks extension (ERC-8004)
- [ ] Meta-transactions (ERC-2771)
- [ ] Security considerations
- [ ] Other

## Description

Describe your question, proposal, or discussion point in detail.

## Motivation

Why is this important for the ERC-8183 standard?

## Specification Impact

How would this affect the current ERC-8183 specification?
